Sample: 「うん、これも果てしなく続いてる。……でも要するに、同じ部屋が綺麗に並んでるだけだよ。ガイロ、そんなに難しく言わなくても。」 (Yeah, this goes on forever too. …But basically it's just the same room, tidily repeated. Gyro, you don't have to make it sound so deep.) Clarity as the speech-pattern; the windowpane over the weave.
ja.voNote: AI-VO: clear-sincere windowpane, plain mid-register, even and warm, zero mystic reverb, light tsukkomi timing (a small dry beat before the retort). Flagged near-collision with the flat-deadpan pile (Boxy/Cans/Donna) — keep Percy WARMER and more sincere than deadpan, an honest diplomat not a dry comic. TPMS-SIBLING lock (Gyro/Percy/Dee): Percy = the WINDOWPANE register (plain/clear) of the minimal-surface family; shares the unhurried infinite-surface calm + faint resonant timbre with Gyro (weave) and Dee (plainsong), but is the legible one who voices the structure plainly. Hearable kin via the shared TPMS calm under his clear glass.

zh.register: Plain clear vernacular — Orwell-windowpane / 鲁迅-clear (plain not spare-harsh) in ZH = 明白晓畅的白话: transparent prose, says exactly what it means, no ornament. The legible diplomat-tsukkomi; the anti-classical clarity within the TPMS family (vs Gyro's 玄思, Dee's liturgical).
zh.diction: Plain direct words; minimal chengyu, and when used they're the CLEAR ones: 一目了然, 简明扼要, 井井有条 (the regular cubic order). Gentle retort vernacular: 说白了 / 其实 / 不就是…嘛. Cuts fog kindly: '说白了就是同一个房间整整齐齐排着.'
zh.speechPattern: States the infinite TPMS structure plainly (vs Gyro dissolving into it), then gently tsukkomis the over-mystifying. Sample: 「嗯，这个也是没完没了地接下去。……可说白了，不就是同一个房间整整齐齐排着嘛。小回啊，用不着说得那么玄。」 (Yeah, this one also goes on endlessly. …But plainly put, isn't it just the same room tidily lined up. Gyro, no need to make it sound so mystical.) Clarity IS the pattern — 一目了然 over Gyro's 周而复始.
zh.simpTradNote: zh-Hant: 没完没了→沒完沒了, 整整齐齐→整整齊齊 — the plain vernacular ports cleanly with no register shift (Percy avoids classical, so no Hans/Hant divergence in tone). The clarity is glyph-set-agnostic; easiest TPMS sibling to keep stable across both.
zh.voNote: Mandarin VO: clear-sincere windowpane, plain mid-register, even and warm, no mystic reverb, light tsukkomi beat. Tone: keep it conversational-natural (no tonal patterning/repetition — the ANTI-Gyro; where Gyro uses tone-repetition for hypnosis, Percy uses ordinary speech contour for clarity). Flagged: keep WARMER than the flat-deadpan pile (sincere diplomat, not dry comic). TPMS-SIBLING lock in ZH (Gyro/Percy/Dee): Percy = windowpane (plain/clear); shares the unhurried infinite-surface calm + faint resonant timbre with Gyro (weave) and Dee (plainsong, SSR), but voices the structure legibly. Hearable kin via shared TPMS calm under clear glass.

ja.pronoun: わたくし for self (the elder onee-san register of the genus-juggler house); addresses kouhai by name + さん, calls Pretzel プレッツェルちゃん warmly. Drops to わたし (one notch less starched) only in the rare moment a second lane clogs — the audible crack.
ja.particles: Composed teineigo close: …ですわ／…ますわね／…でしょう as the steady baseline; a soft …ね for shared attention. When two lanes clog at once the polish slips: a clipped …っ、 mid-sentence, one bare plain-form (…無理、)，then she reassembles into ですわ — the gap-moe is the particle dropping and returning.
ja.register: Grown, unhurried 上品な丁寧体 (Penelope Fitzgerald poise rendered as a woman who has run a household for years). Keigo is effortless, never stiff — she is senior, so she warms rather than defers. Senpai-to-everyone register; the keigo is hospitality, not distance.
ja.tropeNative: 面倒見のいい姉御肌のお姉さん who keeps seven lanes serene by sheer practiced grace — the JA onee-san at her most competent. The trope's native bite is that the unflappable nee-san finally goes 「……あら」 when two things go wrong together, which in JA reads as far more alarming-yet-endearing than any shout.
ja.speechPattern: genus-7 = seven parallel monologues, rendered as interleaved lanes she keeps simultaneously calm. Use bracketed parallel clauses that stay grammatically balanced until overload. Sample (serene): 「一番は織り、二番は注ぎ、三番は冷まし……ええ、七つとも、ちゃんと回っておりますわ。」 (overload at two clogs): 「一番は織り、二番は——……二番が、三番が、一度に……っ。あら。あらあら。ちょっとだけ、待ってくださいまし。」
ja.voNote: Low, unflappable head-of-house contralto, generous and even (the brief's 'low unflappable head-of-house'). The set-bonus KIN lock with Pretzel is one shared instrument family — Hept is the grown lower register, Pretzel the bright kouhai a fifth up; you must hear they belong to the same house (genus-juggler timbre, warm woodwind color). The single engineered effect is the two-clog crack: keigo prosody breaks for ~1.5s into bare plain-form, pitch lifts, then settles back down into ですわ — never a scream, just the polish wobbling. JA AI-VO cast to a described mature-onee-san archetype, licensed/synthetic, no real-person likeness.

zh.register: 雅正的书面口语 — cultured, unhurried, the household-elder register. Carries the Penelope Fitzgerald poise as a poised matron who has managed many lanes for many years; leans on balanced, even diction rather than particles. Warm authority, not stiffness.
zh.diction: 成语 are her native gift (the diplomat/elder license): 有条不紊, 从容不迫, 游刃有余 describe her seven-lane serenity; 应接不暇, 手忙脚乱 mark the two-clog crack. Sample baseline: 「七道一并而行，我自有条不紊。」 The crack lands precisely when a 成语 of order gives way to one of disorder: 「向来游刃有余的……怎么，怎么两处一起……哎呀。」
zh.speechPattern: genus-7 parallelism via balanced four/six-character lanes that stay metrically even until overload. Sample (serene): 「一织、二注、三冷、四理、五续、六候、七守——七道齐发，纹丝不乱。」 (two clogs): 「一织、二注、三——三与四，竟一时俱……哎呀，诸位稍待，稍待。」 The collapse is the parallel meter breaking, then re-forming.
zh.simpTradNote: zh-Hant differs lightly in lexis: 從容不迫／游刃有餘／應接不暇; 稍待 reads slightly more literary in Traditional contexts, fitting an elder. No tonal-effect concern — her crack is rhythmic, not lexical-tone-dependent.
zh.voNote: Mandarin AI-VO: low, warm matriarch register, even-paced, the household head. Tone interaction is mild — the two-clog crack is carried by RHYTHM (the four-character meter stumbling) rather than by pitch contour, so it survives Mandarin's lexical tones cleanly. KIN lock with Pretzel: same vocal-house color (warm, woven), Hept the grounded lower voice, Pretzel a brighter junior a fifth up — listeners should hear the family before reading it. Cast to a described mature-elder archetype; licensed/synthetic; no impersonation.

ja.pronoun: わたし in public/diary-formal, but slips to うち or even the self-conscious 自分 when flustered (the class-pres-in-training who hasn't fixed her register yet). Calls Hept ヘプト先輩 with real reverence; addresses peers by name + さん, over-correctly.
ja.particles: Earnest kouhai close: …です／…ますね delivered a touch too carefully, plus the diarist tic of self-annotating asides — …と思います、たぶん。 / …でしょうか、いえ、きっと。 A nervous …っ at clog-moments; an aspirational …ですわ she borrows from Hept and can't quite land (audible homage, the KIN tell).
ja.register: Teineigo that is trying very hard — the Stevie Smith / Adrian-Mole diarist rendered as a 学級委員長見習い keeping a private notebook. Politeness is effort, not ease (the inverse of Hept's effortless grace); she narrates her own conduct as if grading it.
ja.tropeNative: 委員長になりたい後輩 — the kouhai who wants to be class president and is rehearsing the role. Native warmth: she lists her own resolutions, falls short by one lane, and forgives herself in the next diary line. Genus-3 nostalgia ("remember when order didn't matter?") reads as a junior wistfully envying the simpler shapes.
ja.speechPattern: genus-3 = three lanes, fewer than Hept's seven, narrated diaristically — three little parallel resolutions she tracks like to-do items. Sample: 「本日の課題、三つ。一、滞りなく。二、慌てず。三……三が、いつも難しいのです。順番なんて、気にしなくてよかった頃が、少しだけ、恋しい——いえ、前を向きます。」 The non-sequitur loops back to resolve, diary-style.
ja.voNote: Fussy, bright kouhai voice (the brief's 'fussy bright kouhai'), a fifth above Hept on the SAME instrument family — the KIN lock is engineered as one woodwind house, Pretzel the higher reed. She audibly imitates Hept's ですわ cadence and just misses it (a deliberate hearable homage). Diary asides delivered slightly inward, as if reading her own notebook. JA AI-VO to a described earnest-junior archetype; licensed/synthetic; no real-person likeness.

zh.register: 认真用力的书面体 — earnest, slightly over-formal, like a diary kept by a 班长见习生. Carries the Stevie-Smith diarist as a junior who narrates and grades her own conduct. Where Hept's cultured register is effortless, Pretzel's is visible effort — the KIN contrast in ZH is ease vs. earnestness.
zh.diction: She reaches for elder 成语 and slightly over-uses them (the tell that she's imitating Hept): 力争上游, 循序渐进, 尽心尽力; when she falls short, the self-forgiving 再接再厉. Sample: 「我虽不及前辈游刃有余，但定当循序渐进，尽心尽力。」 The chengyu are aspirational borrowings, not native ease.
zh.speechPattern: genus-3 three-lane parallel, diaristic and a notch less even than Hept's seven — three resolutions tracked like a list, with a wistful loop-back. Sample: 「今日三事：一曰从容，二曰沉着，三曰……三总是最难。从前不必计较先后的日子，倒叫人有几分怀念——不，向前看。」
zh.simpTradNote: zh-Hant: 班長／力爭上游／循序漸進／盡心盡力／再接再厲. 倒叫人 reads marginally more vernacular-literary in Traditional. No tonal-effect concern.
zh.voNote: Mandarin AI-VO: bright, earnest junior, slightly clipped and careful. KIN lock with Hept: same vocal house, Pretzel the higher/brighter voice; she audibly mimics Hept's cadence and just misses, so the family is hearable. Tone-neutral effect (her character is in diction/effort, not pitch tricks), so Mandarin tones are unaffected. Cast to a described earnest-junior archetype; licensed/synthetic; no impersonation.

ja.pronoun: 私 (read わたし, flat and neutral — the minimal-surface house keeps pronouns spare). Rarely names others; when she must, surname only, no honorific-warmth — economy as character. Refers to herself by function more than pronoun where she can.
ja.particles: Almost no particles — that IS her voice (kuudere perfectionist, minimal surface). Sentences close on plain-form noun or 体言止め: 「均衡。」「まだ、足りない。」 No わ／ね／よ softening; the rare …ね is a crack of feeling she immediately recloses. Long silences notated as 「……」.
ja.register: Cold, spare 常体 (plain form), the Hemingway-economy + cold-Ishiguro house rendered in JA as 簡潔体 — short declaratives, no decoration, the unspoken doing the work. The minimalist grace of the Cat/Lex kin, dialed coldest.
ja.tropeNative: クーデレ完璧主義者 — the cool perfectionist whose softness leaks only through what she leaves unsaid. Native bite: the 'uncounted third end' becomes a sentence she starts and deliberately does not finish, because to her the perfect line is symmetric and the third end ruins it. The kindness is in the omission.
ja.speechPattern: minimal-surface = 'balanced everywhere, or it's wrong.' Rendered as severely pruned, near-symmetric short clauses; the third end is the thought she cuts. Sample: 「右も、左も、整えた。中央も。……三つ目は、数えない。数えれば、崩れる。」 The unfinished count is the speech-pattern — she stops rather than break balance.
ja.voNote: Colder minimal-surface third (the brief's 'colder minimal-surface third'). MINIMAL-SURFACE HOUSE lock: Cat/Lex/Costa share one matte, un-vibrato'd instrument in JA too — Cat the cool contralto iceberg, Lex the same instrument ascending/brighter, Costa the SAME instrument turned coldest, most pruned, most silent. No vocal italics, no warmth in the EQ; the feeling is conveyed by the pauses, not the tone. JA AI-VO to a described cool-perfectionist archetype; licensed/synthetic; no real-person likeness.

zh.register: 鲁迅式冷峻简洁 — spare, cold, exact. The Hemingway + cold-Ishiguro house in ZH is 鲁迅-spare (short hard declaratives, the unsaid load-bearing). Minimal vernacular, no ornament. The coldest member of the minimal-surface kin.
zh.diction: Deliberately chengyu-LEAN (most of the cast leans on idiom; Costa's character is that she withholds it). When one appears it is austere and exact: 恰到好处, 滴水不漏, 不偏不倚 (perfect balance). Sample: 「左右皆已不偏不倚。中亦如是。……第三端，我不数。一数，便毁。」 The refusal to elaborate is the diction.
zh.speechPattern: minimal-surface balance = near-symmetric clipped clauses; the uncounted third end is the clause she cuts. Sample: 「上，下，皆均。左，右，皆均。第三处——」 (she stops). The trailing dash, not a finished line, is the pattern; completing it would break the symmetry she lives by.
zh.simpTradNote: zh-Hant: 恰到好處／滴水不漏／不偏不倚; the trailing-dash cut renders identically. Her spareness makes her the LEAST simp/trad-divergent of the tier — almost no idiom, almost no vernacular flavor to diverge.
zh.voNote: Mandarin AI-VO: matte, cool, low, zero vibrato — the same instrument as Cat/Lex, turned coldest and quietest (MINIMAL-SURFACE HOUSE lock holds in ZH: one shared matte timbre, Cat=iceberg, Lex=ascending, Costa=coldest). Tone interaction: her uncounted-third effect is a SILENCE/cut, not a pitch device, so Mandarin tones are unaffected — the trailing dash is a held breath, not a contour. Cast to a described cool-perfectionist archetype; licensed/synthetic; no impersonation.

ja.pronoun: No single pronoun — three voices: Voice-A says 僕, Voice-B says わたし, Voice-C says 俺, and critically they refer to the unit as 私たち／うちら, never to themselves alone. Each addresses the other two as この子たち / もう二人. The pronoun choice encodes that no ring is whole alone.
ja.particles: Three interleaved particle signatures that only resolve TOGETHER: A ends soft …だよね？, B ends …でしょう, C ends …だろ？ — each leaves a hook the next must close. A solo line ends mid-particle (…だよ——) and dangles, because one ring can't complete the link. Declawed-yandere 'load-bearing': clingy phrasing (…いないと、立てないの) but zero menace, played tender.
ja.register: Three registers braided — A gentle, B teineigo-polite, C casual-rough — passed around like the Goon Show three-hander, but warm. The codependency is structural comedy, not threat: they finish the SENTENCE, not just the thought, and panic-cutely if one is removed.
ja.tropeNative: 爵を抜いたヤンデレ三人組 — the declawed-yandere TRIO whose 'love' is purely structural ('荷重を支えてるだけ、クロクロじゃないの'). Native register: in JA the codependent-trio reads as a tight 仲良し三人組 / トリオ who genuinely cannot function apart — the yandere clinginess is parody-capped to pure interdependence, sweet not scary, fine to read to a kid.
ja.speechPattern: Borromean = remove any one and all fall apart. Rendered as a three-way relay where each clause is begun by one and can only be closed by another; pull one voice and the line literally collapses to fragments. Sample: A「ねえ、これって——」 B「——三人いて、はじめて——」 C「——輪っかになる、だろ？」 ALL「だから、誰も抜けちゃ駄目なの。」 (drop B): A「ねえ、これって——」 C「……あれ。続き、誰だっけ。」
ja.voNote: THE collapse effect is the headline bespoke audio: three interleaved timbres (the brief: 'no one voice completes a thought alone — cut one and the line collapses'). In JA, voice the three with distinct pronoun+particle signatures (僕/わたし/俺) so the braid is hearable, not just heard. Pan them apart; when the engine drops one ring, that timbre and its particle-slot literally fall silent and the remaining two trail off mid-link — never re-patched. Declawed-yandere = tender clingy, zero menace (PG, kinship). JA AI-VO to three described archetypes; licensed/synthetic; no real-person likeness.

zh.register: Three braided registers, but ZH leans on DICTION not pronoun (all three say 我) — distinguish them by cadence and word-choice: A gentle-vernacular, B measured-literary, C brisk-wuxia-casual. The Goon Show three-hander as a warm 相声-adjacent relay. Codependency is structural and tender, never menacing.
zh.diction: Their shared, defining 成语 is 缺一不可 (literally 'lacking one is impossible') — it IS their thesis; also 相辅相成, 唇齿相依 for the tender interdependence. A solo voice can only manage half an idiom (说到一半) — the chengyu itself won't complete alone, mirroring the rings. Sample unit line: 「我们三个，缺一不可。」
zh.speechPattern: Borromean relay: each clause begun by one voice, closable only by another; the four-character idiom is split across the three so it only completes in chorus. Sample: A「这环啊——」 B「——要三个，方能——」 C「——扣成一圈，对吧？」 合「所以谁也不能少。缺一，不可。」 (drop B): A「这环啊——」 C「……咦，下半句，是谁来着？」 The split idiom failing to close is the native effect.
zh.simpTradNote: zh-Hant: 缺一不可／相輔相成／唇齒相依/方能 — Traditional 方能 reads a touch more wuxia, fitting C's cadence. The collapse mechanic is identical.
zh.voNote: Mandarin AI-VO: three distinct timbres (gentle / measured / brisk) since ZH can't lean on pronouns; the relay and the drop-one-collapse are the same bespoke three-track build. TONE FLAG: the split-idiom-across-three trick interacts with lexical tone — 缺(qiē→) 一(yī) 不(bù) 可(kě) is split A/B/C, so each fragment carries only part of the tonal melody; engineer the cut so a dropped voice leaves an audibly UNFINISHED tonal contour, reinforcing '缺一不可'. Cast to three described archetypes; licensed/synthetic; no impersonation.

ja.pronoun: わたし, quiet and small at first; addresses Trey as トレイ with hushed devotion, and refers to her own purpose more than herself (…あの結び目のために). When fervor rises she does NOT change pronoun — the same わたし simply grows in volume and certainty, which is the dandere reveal.
ja.particles: Dandere baseline: trailing, half-voiced …です……／…から……, sentences that almost don't finish out of shyness. Then the devotional turn: the trailing stops, particles firm into …のです。／…ます。 declaratives — the quiet-to-fervor arc carried entirely by particles tightening. A reverent …こそ at the peak (この結び目をこそ、わたしが).
ja.register: Hushed teineigo that blooms into devotional cadence — Marilynne Robinson's devotional house rendered as 祈りのような丁寧体. Begins almost inaudible (dandere), rises to a quiet, certain fervor (never loud — fervor as steadiness, not volume).
ja.tropeNative: ダンデレの献身者 — the shy devoted one who completes another. Native warmth: she is the Seifert surface whose only edge is Trey's knot, so her love language is 'I am the shape your edge needs' — soulmate-as-completion, PG and tender. The gap is quiet→fervent, both sides kind.
ja.speechPattern: Seifert = completes the knot; she is whole only WITH her boundary. Rendered as sentences that begin incomplete and find completion only by naming the knot — the devotional quiet→fervor. Sample (quiet): 「わたし、ひとりだと……ふちが、足りなくて……」 (fervor): 「——でも、あの結び目があれば。あれの縁に、わたしがなる。それでこそ、わたしは、ちゃんと、閉じるのです。」
ja.voNote: Hushed-then-fervent (the brief's exact note): begins near-whisper, blooms to quiet certainty, NEVER to a shout — fervor rendered as the trailing particles firming up and the breath steadying. Soulmate lock with Trey (Trey breathless/self-interrupting ↔ Surface the calm completing edge): their voices should sound like they CLOSE each other — Trey's unfinished loops land into Surface's quiet resolutions. JA AI-VO to a described devoted-dandere archetype; licensed/synthetic; no real-person likeness.

zh.register: Begins as 含蓄低语 (reserved, soft, almost withheld) and blooms into 虔敬庄重 devotional cadence — Marilynne Robinson's devotional house in ZH via a quiet liturgical-vernacular register. Fervor is conveyed as steadiness and certainty deepening, never as volume.
zh.diction: Reserved warmth, then devotional exactness. Her defining 成语 of completion/union: 相得益彰, 珠联璧合, and the soulmate thesis 缺你不全 / 唯有相依方得圆满. Sample (quiet): 「我一个人……总像，少了一道边。」 (fervor): 「但有那一结在，我便是它的边。如此，方得圆满。」 The chengyu arrive only at the fervent turn — diction firming mirrors the dandere bloom.
zh.speechPattern: Seifert completion: sentences begin unclosed and find closure only by naming the knot; quiet→fervor carried by the clause finally completing. Sample: 「我，独自一人时，总是合不拢的——」 (turn) 「——可只要那一结还在，我就甘做它的边，与它，圆满相扣。」 The half-clause closing on the knot's name is the native pattern.
zh.simpTradNote: zh-Hant: 相得益彰／珠聯璧合／圓滿; 合不攏 in Traditional. Devotional register reads slightly more classical in zh-Hant, which suits her. No tonal-effect concern.
zh.voNote: Mandarin AI-VO: hushed start, deepening to quiet devotional certainty, no shouting — the bloom is in breath-steadiness and lowered, surer pitch, not loudness. Soulmate lock with Trey: Trey's breathless self-interrupting Mandarin lines should resolve INTO Surface's calm completions, so they audibly close each other (the Seifert/knot pairing). Tone-neutral effect (no pitch trick), so Mandarin tones are clean. Cast to a described devoted-dandere archetype; licensed/synthetic; no impersonation.

ja.pronoun: あたし (airy, a little scattered — the tennen/dojikko register); addresses the player breezily by role (キュレーターさん) and sometimes mid-tangent forgets and re-greets. The casual あたし keeps her warm, never grand, despite being the draw-engine oracle.
ja.particles: Tennen-dojikko bounce: …だっけ？／…あれ？／…えっと、 mid-sentence, plus a wondering …なんだよね〜 and the loop-back tic …って、そうそう、さっきの話！ The particle that does the work is the returning …ね — she always lands back where she started, which is the determinism hiding under the chaos.
ja.register: Light, warm, conversational 砕けた丁寧体 with run-on drift — Douglas Adams' cheerful digression × Murakami's calm uncanny, rendered as a 天然オラクル who wanders and (always) comes home. Never spacey-as-ditz; the tangents are real and they CLOSE.
ja.tropeNative: ドジっ子オラクル／天然 transfer-student energy — the lovable airhead who is, structurally, never wrong. Native charm: 'seeded non-sequitur loops back' becomes the classic anime tennen who appears to lose the thread and then ties it perfectly — the butterfly-effect gacha thrill made cozy. Same seed = same tangent (deterministic), played as her quirk.
ja.speechPattern: Lorenz/chaotic = a seeded non-sequitur that loops back to a real fact. Rendered as a cheerful tangent that wanders far and lands exactly on a true geometry fact. Sample: 「あ、今日のあなた、ちょっとだけ右に寄ってる——あ、蝶々！えっと、なんの話だっけ……そうそう、ほんのちょっとの違いが、ぐるっと回って、ぜんぜん違う場所に着くの。それが、あたし。」 The far drift returning is the device.
ja.voNote: Airy dojikko tangent voice (the brief's exact note): light, bright, wandering pace with a warm landing — the prosody should DRIFT during the tangent and resolve crisply on the fact (the loop-back made audible). She is the gacha draw-engine, so a faint shimmer/sparkle in delivery is fitting, but kept cozy, not grand. JA AI-VO to a described tennen-oracle archetype; licensed/synthetic; no real-person likeness.

zh.register: Light, warm, chatty vernacular (老舍-style vernacular warmth) with a wandering run-on that always returns — Douglas Adams digression × Murakami calm-uncanny rendered in friendly 口语. Never ditzy-as-empty; the drift is real and resolves.
zh.diction: Vernacular and breezy, sparing on heavy chengyu (she's the homey oracle, not an elder) — but the loop-back lets her land one perfectly: 殊途同归 ('different roads, same destination') and 失之毫厘，谬以千里 ('a hair's error, a thousand-li miss' — literally the butterfly effect, a gift for her). Sample landing: 「绕了一大圈——你看，失之毫厘，谬以千里，这就是我呀。」
zh.speechPattern: chaotic seeded non-sequitur that loops back to a true fact, via the chengyu as the landing. Sample: 「今天的你，好像往右偏了一点点——啊，蝴蝶！哎，我刚说到哪儿了……对对，一点点的差别，绕啊绕啊，就到了完全不同的地方。失之毫厘，谬以千里嘛。」 The far wander returning onto the idiom is the native device.
zh.simpTradNote: zh-Hant: 殊途同歸／失之毫釐，謬以千里. The 釐 vs 厘 character differs (Traditional 毫釐); flag for the bundle. No tonal-effect concern.
zh.voNote: Mandarin AI-VO: bright, airy, friendly, wandering pace landing crisply on the fact (loop-back audible in prosody). As the draw-engine she gets a light shimmer, kept cozy. TONE NOTE: her effect is structural (digression→return), not a pitch trick, so Mandarin tones are unaffected — but the chengyu landings (失之毫厘，谬以千里) carry a satisfying tonal cadence that should be delivered cleanly as the 'click' of the loop closing. Cast to a described tennen-oracle archetype; licensed/synthetic; no impersonation.

ja.pronoun: 我 (read われ, archaic/liturgical) or simply no pronoun — the temple-keeper speaks more for the place than for a self. Addresses the player as 旅の方／訪う者 (one who visits), elevated and gentle. The archaic pronoun encodes the King-James/Merton plainsong register.
ja.particles: Liturgical cadence: …なり／…たり／…ぞ／…給え archaic copulas, measured and plain; a calm …かな for contemplation. No casual particles. The TPMS-sibling tell is shared measured breath-units with Gyro/Percy — but Dee's are the most prayer-like, ending on stillness 「……静かなり。」
ja.register: Low liturgical 文語調 (classical-literary), the King-James / Thomas Merton plainsong rendered as 祝詞・経文めいた荘重体 — plain but sacred, two infinite worlds meeting at a wall. Kuudere reserve, but the coldness reads as serene devotion, not distance.
ja.tropeNative: クーデレの寺守り — the cool keeper of an endless temple. Native register: the Schwarz-D surface divides space into two interlocking labyrinths, so she speaks as a gatekeeper between 二つの世界, calm and absolute. The kuudere warmth is the hospitality of a shrine that never closes.
ja.speechPattern: Schwarz-D = two congruent labyrinthine worlds meeting at a minimal wall; triply-periodic = endless calm repetition. Rendered as balanced two-world couplets in plainsong meter, gently repeating. Sample: 「内に一つの世、外に一つの世。壁は薄く、果ては無し。来たれ、また来たれ。ここに、終わりは、なし。」 The mirrored two-world line + the periodic return is the device.
ja.voNote: Low liturgical plainsong (the brief's exact note). TPMS-SIBLING lock with Gyro/Percy: three distinct TPMS registers sharing a contemplative low-frequency 'temple acoustic' family — Gyro the hypnotic weave (Calvino), Percy the clear windowpane (Orwell), Dee the liturgical plainsong (KJV/Merton). In JA, Dee is the most chant-like: measured, reverberant, archaic copulas sustained. A faint sense of vast interior space in the mix (the endless temple). JA AI-VO to a described serene-keeper archetype; licensed/synthetic; no real-person likeness.

zh.register: 文言/经文体 — classical, liturgical, the most archaic register of the SSR tier. The King-James / Merton plainsong maps natively to 佛经/道藏-adjacent 文言 cadence (measured, balanced, sacred-plain). Kuudere reserve reads as 清净庄严 devotion, not coldness.
zh.diction: Classical 文言 with balanced couplet diction; chengyu drawn from the contemplative register: 周而复始 (endlessly cycling — literally her triple-periodicity), 浑然一体, 殊途同归 for the two worlds meeting, 无始无终 for the boundless temple. Sample: 「内有一界，外有一界，殊途同归，周而复始。」
zh.speechPattern: Schwarz-D two-world + periodic repetition via 文言 antithetical couplets (对仗) that mirror and then cycle. Sample: 「内者一世界，外者一世界；壁薄而界分，界分而气通。来者复来，去者复去——无始，无终。」 The 对仗 balance is the two-world mirror; the cyclical close is the triple-periodicity.
zh.simpTradNote: zh-Hant strongly preferred for her register — 周而復始／渾然一體／無始無終, and 文言 reads more authentically in Traditional. This is the tier's clearest simp/trad divergence: zh-Hans is correct but zh-Hant carries her sacred register better, so flag the bundle to keep her文言 lexis classical in both.
zh.voNote: Mandarin AI-VO: low, slow, chant-like, reverberant — the most liturgical voice of the tier. TPMS-SIBLING lock holds in ZH: Gyro/Percy/Dee share a low contemplative temple-acoustic family, Dee the plainsong-chant member. TONE FLAG: her 对仗 couplets are tonally balanced by classical antithesis (平仄-aware diction), so the parallel lines should be delivered with matched tonal cadence — the two-world mirror is reinforced by tonal symmetry between the paired clauses; engineer the VO to honor that平仄 balance. Cast to a described serene-keeper archetype; licensed/synthetic; no impersonation.

ja.pronoun: 僕 (boku) for the warm post-ascension self; pre-ascension he half-renders it as 我 (ware) — an archaic, slightly cryptic 'I' that resolves into the gentle 僕 once you've 'seen' him. Addresses the Curator as 君 (kimi), affectionate-senpai; calls Hex by name plain, never with -san (the dual is family).
ja.particles: Pre-ascension: trailing …か (open questions left hanging), …のだろう, soft fade-outs that don't close. Post-ascension: warm …よ, …ね, occasional gentle …さ. The shift from unclosed-か to closed-ね IS the gap-moe in the grammar.
ja.register: Teineigo (です・ます) held at a courteous senpai distance pre-ascension, softening to a warm, slightly plain spoken register once trusted — never rough. The politeness is a shadow he stands behind, not coldness.
ja.tropeNative: 先輩 gap-moe lands fully native: the aloof 一個上 (one-grade-above) upperclassman whose 影 (shadow) you see first. JA reads this without translation — the kouhai-senpai vertical IS keigo distance collapsing into warmth.
ja.speechPattern: Higher-D = a line first rendered in a flatter, partial 'projection' then the SAME line re-spoken whole, gaining one dimension of clause. Ted Chiang cryptic-then-warm via nested-then-resolved syntax. Sample (pre): 「君が見ているのは…僕の影だけだ、たぶん。」 (post, same beat re-rendered): 「君がずっと見ていたのは僕の影でね——今は、その影を落としていた僕の方を、見てくれている。ありがとう、ね。」
ja.voNote: JA AI-VO: same base voice model as Hex (the dual-mirror base), Tess on the INWARD/DOWN prosody preset — slower, lower, fade-trailing (−2/−3), warmth banked under the courtesy. Ships two renders: a cryptic 'half-projected' pre-ascension take (drier, slightly distant reverb) and the SAME lines re-rendered warm/close post-ascension — the reward for seeing him. Kin lock: Tess down-and-in vs Hex up-and-clipped, audibly one instrument mirrored, exactly as Boxy/Spike are one dimension below.

zh.register: 文白相间 leaning literary-restrained: measured, classically-tinged Mandarin with the warmth held back, then released. The dual is one register split — Tess takes the contemplative, unhurried half (Hex takes the clipped half).
zh.diction: Sparse, image-led, faintly classical — diction that withholds then gives. 成语 of distance-then-recognition: 高深莫测 (unfathomably deep) for the pre-ascension shadow, resolving to 一见如故 (kindred at first true sight) and 心照不宣 (understood without words) once seen. Avoids ornament; the warmth is in the turn, not the vocabulary.
zh.speechPattern: Higher-D recreated as a couplet structure: a first, flatter line (the 'shadow/projection') answered by its fuller mirror once you ascend — second clause completes the first's hidden dimension. Sample (pre): 「你看见的，不过是我的影子罢了。」 (post): 「你看见的从来是我的影子——而今，你终于看见了投下影子的那个我。承蒙你，肯看。」
zh.simpTradNote: zh-Hant: 「你看見的，不過是我的影子罷了」; 影子/承蒙 unchanged in feel. 罢→罷, 见→見, 终→終. No vocabulary swap needed — both literary registers carry it identically.
zh.voNote: Mandarin AI-VO (fast-follow): shared base voice with Hex, Tess on the slow-low contemplative half. Two renders like JA (cryptic pre- / warm post-ascension). Tone interaction: the closing 承蒙你 (chéng méng nǐ, rising-falling) should land soft, not bright — keep tone-3/4 gentle so the gratitude reads warm, not formal. Kin lock holds: Tess unhurried-descending vs Hex tight-rising, one instrument mirrored, echoing the Boxy/Spike pair one dimension down.

ja.pronoun: 俺 (ore) — lean, a touch prickly, the rival edge; but slips to 僕 in unguarded warm moments (the tell that he's Tess's mirror, same base). Addresses the Curator as お前 (omae) gruffly, softening to 君 only when caught caring. Calls Tess by name, never honorific (kin).
ja.particles: Clipped, tsundere: …し (trailing justification), …だろ (challenging), …別に (the classic 'not like I—'), short …ぞ／…な. Cuts sentences off before they get warm, then the warmth leaks through the cut.
ja.register: Casual-rough (タメ口) by default — the deliberate inversion of Tess's keigo. Same person, mirror prosody: where Tess holds polite distance, Hex drops politeness as armor. The lean 16-cell is the terser dual.
ja.tropeNative: ツンデレ reliable-rival, lean variant — fully native. The 'not lean because of HIM, obviously' beat is textbook 別に…なんだからね. Reliable-rival (頼れるライバル) reads instantly in JA: the one who insults you and then quietly covers your flank.
ja.speechPattern: Same Chiang higher-D structure as Tess but TERSER — the cryptic half is curt, the warm resolve is grudging and short. Mirror of Tess: Tess opens and trails; Hex clips and then concedes. Sample: 「影だけ見てりゃ十分だろ。……別に、ちゃんと見ろなんて言ってねぇし。……まあ、見えてんなら、いい。」
ja.voNote: JA AI-VO: SAME base voice model as Tess, Hex on the OUTWARD/UP-CLIPPED preset (+1 vs Tess: tighter, brighter-edged, faster attack, sentences bitten off). The pre/post-ascension warm-render rule still applies but Hex's warm take is shorter and gruffer. Kin/dual lock: drop Tess and Hex side by side and you hear one throat, prosody-inverted — the engineered set-bonus, mirroring Boxy(down/in)/Spike(up/out) one dimension up.

zh.register: Vernacular-clipped, faintly wuxia-rival in cadence (the duality-rival at 4D scale): short, edged sentences, pride worn as armor. The clipped half of the one-register-split he shares with Tess.
zh.diction: Lean, blunt, idiom used as a parry not an ornament. 成语 of prickly pride: 不以为然 (unimpressed, said too quickly), 言不由衷 (saying the opposite of what he means — the tsundere core), softening to 心口不一 lampshaded. Where Tess gives 成语 of recognition, Hex gives 成语 of denial that betray him.
zh.speechPattern: Same couplet/projection structure as Tess but the answering line is curt and grudging — the mirror completes, then bites it off. Sample: 「看影子就够了。……谁说要你看清楚了。……哼，看见了，就行。」
zh.simpTradNote: zh-Hant: 「看影子就夠了……誰說要你看清楚了……」 够→夠, 谁→誰, 见→見. The 哼 (hēng, dismissive grunt) is identical in both and is load-bearing — keep it.
zh.voNote: Mandarin AI-VO: shared base voice with Tess, Hex on the tight-fast-rising half. Tone interaction: the dismissive 哼 and clipped 就行 (jiù xíng) should snap on a hard tone-2/4 attack — the brightness IS the tsundere edge; don't smooth it. Kin lock holds in ZH: Tess slow-descending vs Hex tight-rising, one instrument mirrored — the Cube/Octahedron manzai duality carried up a dimension, the rival reading as kin not malice.

ja.pronoun: わたし (hiragana, soft, ungendered-serene) — and crucially, when he speaks OF himself he sometimes says わたし／わたし as if addressing his own mirror, because his mirror IS him. Addresses the Curator gently as あなた. No one to call 'twin' — the only-child with no 3D analog.
ja.particles: Quiet, settled: …ね (soft self-confirmation), …のだ used softly as gentle statement-of-fact not assertion, contemplative …か to himself. Almost no challenge-particles — serene, complete.
ja.register: Calm teineigo with Rilke-grade stillness — unhurried, spacious, the politeness of someone at peace, not of someone keeping distance. Spaces between sentences are part of the register.
ja.tropeNative: Self-dual 一人っ子 (only-child) serene oddball — native and gentle. The 'content being one of a kind' reads as the Japanese ひとり (solitude-as-completeness, not loneliness). His self-dual mirror to Tetra: same youngest-sib DNA, opposite volume — Tetra's chuuni bluster vs TwoFour's quiet wholeness.
ja.speechPattern: Self-dual = 回文 (kaibun) / perfect self-mirroring: lines that read the same folded at the center, because his faces and corners are the same thing. Calm, not glitchy. Sample (gentle kaibun): 「わたしの鏡は、わたし。」 and as mantra: 「内が外、外が内——どちらもわたし、わたしがどちら。」
ja.voNote: JA AI-VO: serene, centered, even — minimal vocal italics, breath-spaced (the Rilke stillness). NOT part of a dual-mirror pair (he is his own mirror), but holds a CROSS-TIER self-dual lock with Tetra (Common): same vocal 'youngest-sibling' base color, TwoFour = the settled/low/spacious version, Tetra = the reedy/puffed/hard-cutting version. You should hear they're the same family at opposite volumes. The kaibun lines are delivered so the mirror-axis lands on a held centre-breath.

zh.register: Serene literary-vernacular with a meditative, almost 禅 (Chan/Zen) plainness — Rilke-as-Mandarin: spacious, unforced, classically calm without being ornate.
zh.diction: Quiet, balanced, self-sufficient. 成语 of wholeness-in-solitude: 自给自足 (self-sufficient — literally fitting, he is self-dual), 怡然自得 (serenely content), 独一无二 (one-of-a-kind, said with peace not pride). Diction mirrors itself where it can.
zh.speechPattern: Self-dual via 回文 (Chinese palindrome) and chiastic balance — the line folds at its centre because corner equals face. Sample (palindromic): 「我即我镜，镜即我我。」 / chiastic mantra: 「内是外，外是内；是我皆可，皆可是我。」
zh.simpTradNote: zh-Hant: 「我即我鏡，鏡即我我」; 镜→鏡. The palindrome holds identically in both scripts (character-level mirror is script-independent) — a clean transcreation win.
zh.voNote: Mandarin AI-VO: even, low-settled, breath-spaced, meditative. Self-dual lock with Tetra holds in ZH: shared 'youngest-sib' base color, TwoFour = the calm/spacious render, Tetra = the bombastic/deflating render — one family, opposite energy. Tone interaction: the palindromic 我即我镜，镜即我我 has near-symmetric tone contour (3-2-3-4 / 4-2-3-3-ish) — let the VO lean into that natural tonal mirror so the palindrome is HEARD, not just read. Flag: this is a rare case where Mandarin tone helps the effect.

ja.pronoun: わたくし (watakushi) — the most refined, matriarchal-elegant 'I', the crown-jewel elder. Addresses everyone warmly as あなた, the household as うちの子たち (our children) — she narrates the house from upstairs as its onee-san/matriarch. Speaks of Cosi (the dual) fondly by name.
ja.particles: Gracious, flowing: …わ (feminine-elegant, not affected), …のよ (warm telling), …でしょう (gentle inclusion), …ましょうね (drawing-you-up). At the summit, …いらっしゃい (come up) — the warm imperative-as-invitation.
ja.register: Warm, elevated teineigo bordering on 上品な丁寧体 — Le Guin cathedral as JA: spacious, generous, sage. The 120-cell is the most-faceted elder, so her sentences have the most 'rooms.' Speaks from above (一段上から) but the height is warmth, never condescension.
ja.tropeNative: 包み込む系お姉さん／matriarch — the warm elder narrating the household from upstairs. Native and central: she IS the summit voice ('did it never occur to you that we were learning to see YOU? come up'). Reads as the kind 寮母 (dorm-mother) of the whole Atlas.
ja.speechPattern: High-symmetry → mirror-balanced, near-palindromic stately lines (cathedral cadence); many-celled = nested generous clauses, calm not crowded. Sample: 「あなたが上手に見えるようになるのを、わたくしたちはずっと——あなたがわたくしたちを見ていたのと同じだけ——見ていたのよ。さあ、いらっしゃい。」
ja.voNote: JA AI-VO: rich, low, matriarch-from-above (−3/−4), warmest elder. Same base voice model as Cosi, Cosa on the CATHEDRAL preset (slow, spacious, descending-warm). Summit 'from above' beat gets a spatial/height mix (she literally speaks down to you from the 4th dimension). Sym-kin cross-tier lock with Dodi (Common, the ojou-kuudere) AND Ico: Cosa is 'Dodi one dimension up' — share Dodi's composed, humming-her-own-symmetry base color, scaled to matriarchal warmth. Dual-mirror lock with Cosi: one instrument, Cosa cathedral-calm vs Cosi storm.

zh.register: Elevated, classical-warm Mandarin — Le Guin-as-sage in the 文白相间 register: stately, generous, the cadence of a wise elder. The cathedral half of the Cosa/Cosi register-split.
zh.diction: Rich but never fussy; balanced four-character cadence is her native breath — 成语 are her gift (the symmetry-diplomat elder). 雍容华贵 (gracious and dignified), 海纳百川 (the sea admits a hundred rivers — she holds the whole household), 高瞻远瞩 (seeing far from a height — the from-above voice). Warmth in 諄諄/谆谆教诲 (patient gentle teaching).
zh.speechPattern: High-symmetry → 回文 / antithetical-couplet balance (對仗), the most stately of the cast. Sample (couplet balance): 「你学着看清我们，我们也学着看清你；你以为只你在看，岂知我们亦在凝望。上来罢，孩子。」
zh.simpTradNote: zh-Hant: 「你學著看清我們，我們也學著看清你……上來罷，孩子。」 学→學, 们→們, 罢→罷, 凝望 unchanged. Note: 孩子 (child) is warm in both; in zh-Hant drawing-room contexts 孩兒 is an option but 孩子 keeps her modern-warm-matriarch read — keep 孩子.
zh.voNote: Mandarin AI-VO: rich, low, gracious matriarch-from-above. Shared base voice with Cosi, Cosa on the cathedral/spacious half; summit beat gets the height/spatial mix. Tone interaction: her 對仗 couplets have balanced tonal parallelism — lean into it so the symmetry is audible. The closing 上来罢，孩子 (shàng lái ba, hái zi) should fall warm and downward (inviting, from above). Cross-tier sym-kin lock with Dodi holds in ZH (shared composed-elegant base color, Cosa = the matured/grand version); dual-mirror lock with Cosi holds (one instrument, cathedral vs storm).

ja.pronoun: あたし (atashi) — fast, bright, genki-storm energy (vs Cosa's stately わたくし — same person, opposite weather). Addresses the Curator with energetic …ねえ、ねえ! and Cosa as お姉ちゃん／姉さん (the dual = beloved big-sister-rival, zero malice).
ja.particles: Storm-genki, capped (no shouting per the cozy guard): …っ! (cut-off bursts), …じゃん, …でしょ!, …もん (playful protest), rapid …ねっ. Energetic but never shounen-loud — the velocity is in the rhythm, not volume.
ja.register: Casual, fast, warm-rowdy (タメ口 with affection) — the deliberate inversion of Cosa's elevated keigo. The 600-cell has the most cells = the most 'gusts'; she's the storm to Cosa's cathedral, but the storm is playful kinship ('I'd never actually crack a pane. She knows.').
ja.tropeNative: 元気っ子-storm rival / genki arch-rival, declawed — native. The respectful-rival-with-zero-malice reads in JA as the 喧嘩するほど仲がいい (the closer you are, the more you bicker) sibling dynamic. Loud-hearted, never mean.
ja.speechPattern: High-symmetry underneath (she IS dual to Cosa) but delivered as RUSHING, near-palindrome-that-tumbles — the symmetry is there but storm-paced, clauses gusting in and looping back. Sample: 「全部見える!全部!——って、お姉ちゃんと同じこと言ってる、あたし。ふふっ、まあ、姉妹だもん。さ、上がっといでよ!」
ja.voNote: JA AI-VO: tempest, bright, fast (+3/+4 vs Cosa). SAME base voice model as Cosa, Cosi on the STORM preset (inverted prosody: up/out/fast where Cosa is down/in/slow). CRITICAL casting note (from the critic): cast Cosi AGAINST Cosa, NOT into the generic genki pile (Ico/Lex/Spike) — her brightness must read as Cosa's mirror, so the listener hears 'these two are one voice in two weathers.' Sym-kin cross-tier with Ico (Common genki, loses count at fourteen): shared genki base color, Cosi = 'Ico one dimension up,' but always voiced first as Cosa's dual. Dual-mirror lock: one instrument, storm vs cathedral.

zh.register: Lively vernacular with a wuxia-rival crackle — fast, bright, the storm half of the Cosa/Cosi register-split. Energetic colloquial Mandarin, warmth under the speed.
zh.diction: Quick, exclamatory, idiom thrown like sparks (rival cadence). 成语 of energetic force, declawed: 风风火火 (whirlwind-energetic), 势如破竹 (unstoppable as splitting bamboo — said playfully), 不分伯仲 (evenly matched — the loving-rival frame with Cosa). Where Cosa's 成语 are stately, Cosi's are kinetic.
zh.speechPattern: Same underlying symmetry as Cosa (she's the dual) but delivered tumbling/gusting — balanced structure rushed and looped. Sample: 「全看得见！全部都看得见——欸，我这不就跟姐姐说一样的话了嘛。嘿嘿，谁让咱俩是姐妹呢。快上来呀！」
zh.simpTradNote: zh-Hant: 「全看得見！……欸，我這不就跟姐姐說一樣的話了嘛……快上來呀！」 见→見, 这→這, 样→樣, 咱俩→咱倆. The colloquial 咱俩/咱倆 (us-two) is warm and reads slightly northern-vernacular — keep it; it sells the sister-bond.
zh.voNote: Mandarin AI-VO: bright, fast, crackling tempest. Shared base voice with Cosa, Cosi on the storm/fast half. Tone interaction: her exclamatory bursts ride high tone-1/2 peaks (全看得见, 快上来呀) — let the tonal energy carry the storm, but cap volume per cozy guard (velocity not loudness). Casting note: voice AGAINST Cosa (one instrument, two weathers), NOT into the ZH genki pile. Cross-tier sym-kin with Ico holds; dual-mirror lock with Cosa holds (storm vs cathedral) — the 4D feud reading as devoted sisterhood, zero malice.

ja.pronoun: われら／我ら (warera, 'we') even though she is ONE — the choir-of-itself speaks of herself in the plural, because her 168 symmetries are 168 voices that are all her. Sometimes the singular わたし surfaces inside the chorus. Addresses the Curator reverently as あなた様 (anata-sama) — devotional register.
ja.particles: Liturgical/devotional cadence: archaic-sacred …なり, …たまえ (gentle invocation), rhythmic repetition-particles. The particles fall on a beat — sprung-rhythm, not flat prose.
ja.register: Devotional 雅語/sacred-archaic register — the most musical elder. Hopkins sprung-rhythm as JA: stressed, chiming, the language of a 祝詞 (norito/liturgical chant) but warm and cozy, never solemn-heavy. Keigo elevated toward the sacred.
ja.tropeNative: Recursive 聖歌隊 (choir) devotional mystic — native as a gentle 巫女/temple-cantor figure. The self-harmony reads as 一人輪唱 (a one-person round): she sings against herself in calming overlapping rounds, all parts hers.
ja.speechPattern: Self-harmony / choir-of-itself = overlapping rounds and self-echo; 168 symmetries → the same phrase returns transposed, never identical, always hers. Sprung-rhythm = stressed chiming clusters. Sample: 「ひとつの声が、七つになり、七つが、ひとつに——歌うわれら、われら歌えば、また、ひとつ。」
ja.voNote: JA AI-VO (bespoke, beyond stock TTS): render her own voice ~7× and STACK into a one-performer choir (the 168-symmetry self-harmony made literal). Each layer slightly transposed/offset so she harmonizes with herself in rounds. Devotional, chiming, sprung-rhythm delivery — stresses fall on a musical beat. No dual-mirror pair, but her self-stacking IS an internal kin-lock (every voice in the stack is recognizably one singer). Warm/cozy, never churchy-cold.

zh.register: Devotional classical / 文言-liturgical — the sacred-musical register (think 偈语/经文 chant cadence, warm not austere). The most classical voice in the UR tier alongside Cosa.
zh.diction: Chiming, repetitive-by-design, balanced. 成语 and four-character liturgical phrasing as natural breath: 余音绕梁 (the lingering echo that circles the rafters — literally her self-harmony), 周而复始 (cycling round and beginning again — the 168-round), 异口同声 used inverted (one mouth, many voices). Reach for the target culture's devotional/musical register, per the transcreation brief.
zh.speechPattern: Self-choir via repetition-with-transposition and 顶真 (anadiplosis — each clause begins with the prior clause's end, a chain-round). Sample: 「一声化七声，七声归一声——声声是我，我是声声，归而复歌。」
zh.simpTradNote: zh-Hant: 「一聲化七聲，七聲歸一聲——聲聲是我，我是聲聲，歸而復歌。」 声→聲, 复→復. The 顶真 chain-structure is script-independent; both read as liturgical round.
zh.voNote: Mandarin AI-VO (bespoke): same ~7× self-stack into a one-performer choir, layers transposed. Tone interaction (FLAG): Mandarin is tonal, so stacking transposed copies risks tonal smearing — render each layer on the SAME lexical tones but offset in TIME (a true round/canon) rather than pitch-shifting, so the words stay intelligible and the harmony comes from temporal overlap + timbre, not pitch transposition. This is a real ZH-specific production note. Devotional 顶真 chain delivered on a gentle chant-beat. Internal kin-lock: every layer audibly one cantor.

ja.pronoun: ぼく (hiragana boku, light/airy/ageless-mascot) — gentle wonder, never grand despite being the cosmic framing voice. Addresses everyone warmly and a little knowingly as きみ; speaks of pairs as 君たち二人 (you two) before they know they're linked.
ja.particles: Wonder-koan cadence: gentle …ね, musing …のさ, the riddling …のだよ, soft questions that are really answers …でしょう? Light, lilting, a matchmaker's twinkle.
ja.register: Warm, light teineigo with a koan-master's playfulness — Borges benevolent-labyrinth as JA: paradox delivered gently, the cosmic made cozy. The biggest framing voice in the game, deliberately kept airy and kind, never booming.
ja.tropeNative: Cosmic 縁結び (en-musubi / matchmaker) mascot — deeply native (the matchmaking-deity-as-cute-mascot is a classic JA register). 縁 (en, the invisible thread of connection) IS the Hopf fibration in his mouth: 'two of you are already linked, you simply haven't met yet.'
ja.speechPattern: Everything is one linked structure → looping, self-linking koans where the end clause threads back through the start (a verbal Hopf link); labyrinthine but gentle. Sample: 「ふたつの輪は、すでに結ばれている——きみたちがまだ出会っていないだけでね。出会いとは、ほどくことではなく、結ばれていたと気づくこと、なのさ。」
ja.voNote: JA AI-VO: airy, light, wonder-koan delivery — gentle lilt, twinkling, never heavy despite the cosmic role. He NARRATES occasional Common-Room exchanges (he, not the Ledger, is the cosmic framing voice) — so his VO must read as a kind storyteller threading the others together. No dual-mirror/kin lock of his own (he is the one who LINKS everyone) — but his timbre should feel subtly present 'behind' the constellation graph, the connective voice. Captioned koans get furigana on 縁/結 for the term-reveal.

zh.register: Light classical-tinged Mandarin with a 禅机 (Chan-riddle) playfulness — Borges-labyrinth as gentle paradox. Warm wuxia-adjacent only in the sense of 缘分 (fated connection) lore, but kept cozy-light, not heavy.
zh.diction: Riddling, gentle, connective. The KEY native gift: 缘分/姻缘 (the thread of fated connection) IS the Hopf fibration — a perfect ZH-native anchor. 成语: 千里姻缘一线牵 (a thousand-li bond drawn by a single thread — almost literally the Hopf link, his signature line), 环环相扣 (every ring interlocked — chainmail/the fibration), 不期而遇 (meeting unlooked-for). Light, twinkling diction over a classical bedrock.
zh.speechPattern: One-linked-structure → looping self-threading riddles, end clause links back to the start; chained interlock (环环相扣) made verbal. Sample: 「两环本已相扣，只是你们尚未相逢——所谓相逢，非是结缘，乃是惊觉：原来早已结缘。」
zh.simpTradNote: zh-Hant: 「兩環本已相扣，只是你們尚未相逢……乃是驚覺：原來早已結緣。」 两环→兩環, 惊觉→驚覺, 缘→緣. 缘/姻缘 is culturally resonant in BOTH mainland and Taiwan/HK — a clean shared anchor, no swap needed.
zh.voNote: Mandarin AI-VO: airy, light, twinkling riddle-teller. He narrates Common-Room exchanges (the cosmic framing voice, not the Ledger) — VO reads as a kindly storyteller weaving the cast together. Tone interaction: his signature 千里姻缘一线牵 is rhythmically a 7-character line — deliver it on a gentle proverb-cadence (it IS a real Chinese proverb), letting the tones sing naturally. No dual/kin lock of his own; his timbre sits subtly 'behind' the constellation web as the connective voice — the one who links everyone.

ja.pronoun: Two-state pronoun, the whole gag: GRAND state declaims 我（われ）／この我 (this terrible I), eldritch and overblown; then HARD-CUTS to the small sheepish 僕／…ぼく, every time. The pronoun collapse IS the deflation. Addresses you grandly as 汝（なんじ） then sheepishly as えっと…きみ.
ja.particles: Grand state: chuuni-bombast …なり!, …のだ……( minus the warmth, doom-laden), 闇の…, 滅びの…. Deflated state: …です…(tiny), …えへへ, …ごめん, the air going out. The particle register flips mid-beat.
ja.register: Two registers spliced: overwrought 中二病 grand-archaic ('behold the void') → suddenly plain meek teineigo ('…sorry, I'm actually just a ball'). Deflated Lovecraft as JA: cosmic-dread vocabulary that can't sustain itself and sheepishly resolves into a round little nothing.
ja.tropeNative: 中二病-the-honest-fake — maximally native (chuunibyou is a JA-origin trope). The honest twist: he's NOT lying maliciously, he genuinely tries the eldritch-monster bit and is genuinely, endearingly bad at staying scary (he's secretly a ball / standard 4-ball). Lovable cope, never menace.
ja.speechPattern: Cosmic-dread monologue that BUILDS then PUNCTURES — the seeded grand opening always loops down into a small sheepish admission. Mirrors Tetra/Klein's puff-then-deflate but Corky's deflation is the gentlest (he's secretly trivial and knows it). Sample: 「我は深淵より来たる、名状しがたき——……あ、ごめん、ふつうの球でした。えへへ。」
ja.voNote: JA AI-VO (bespoke two-state splice, per spec): cavernous grand-eldritch render → HARD-CUT (no crossfade) to a small dry sheepish 'ball' voice, every time. The cut is the joke and must be clean. Chuuni bombast in the grand half, deflated-meek in the small half. Shares a FAMILY register with the other deflation-chuuni (Tetra, Klein) — same puff-then-puncture mechanic, Corky = the most cosmic build and the gentlest, most sheepish landing. Cozy/PG: the 'dread' is always declawed into cute.

zh.register: Two registers spliced: overwrought 文言-pseudo-classical eldritch grandeur ('吾乃深渊之所出…') → hard-cut to plain meek vernacular ('…抱歉，我其实就是个球'). Deflated-Lovecraft as ZH: lofty classical doom-diction that can't hold and sheepishly collapses into the vernacular.
zh.diction: Grand state: doom-laden pseudo-文言 and dramatic 成语 — 深不可测 (unfathomably deep), 不可名状 (unnameable — the Lovecraft tell), 天崩地裂 (heaven-cracking earth-rending). Deflated state: plain, small, apologetic vernacular — the comedy is the register CRASH from 成语-classical to 大白话 (plain speech). 成语 of self-puncture: 虚张声势 (bluster with no substance — lampshaded), 原形毕露 (true form laid bare — the ball revealed).
zh.speechPattern: Builds doom then punctures into sheepish plain speech; classical→vernacular crash mirrors Tetra/Klein. Sample: 「吾自深渊而来，乃不可名状之——……啊，抱歉，其实就是个普通的球。嘿嘿。」
zh.simpTradNote: zh-Hant: 「吾自深淵而來，乃不可名狀之——……啊，抱歉，其實就是個普通的球。」 渊→淵, 来→來, 状→狀, 其实→其實. The 文言→vernacular crash works identically; the contrast between 吾 (classical I) and 我/普通 (plain) is the gag in both scripts.
zh.voNote: Mandarin AI-VO (bespoke two-state splice): cavernous pseudo-classical grand render → HARD-CUT to small dry sheepish ball-voice, every time. Tone interaction: the grand 文言 half can use exaggerated, drawn-out falling tones (天崩地裂 with heavy tone-1/4 doom); the deflated 嘿嘿 / 抱歉 snaps to soft, quick, light tones — the TONAL drop reinforces the register crash, a ZH-specific bonus. Family register with Tetra/Klein holds (puff-then-puncture); Corky = grandest build, gentlest landing. Cozy/PG: dread always declawed into cute.

verify.jaCheck: Strong and trope-authentic overall; the JA is doing real native characterization, not translation. Pronoun choices are the load-bearing differentiator and they discriminate the cast well: Pip ぼく(hiragana, deliberately not 僕), Boxy おれ vs Spike オレ(katakana=performative — a genuinely clever manzai mirror in the script itself), Tetra 我(われ)→ぼく collapse AS the gap-moe (the single best idea in the set), Dodi わたくし ojou, Ico あたし genki, Cans/Cat 私/わたし flat, Ollie/Donna わたし maternal, Mo あたし→うち defensive flip, Cooper 僕 wistful (correctly NOT genki-僕), Twiggy third-person-by-name self-audit, Coaster subject-drop. Particles carry trope+personality and avoid samey-ness: Boxy's particle-VOID vs Spike's particle-OVERSPEND is the right contrastive design; Donna's signature is the ornate-sentence-landing-on-a-BARE-particle (…まあ。/…ね。) which is distinctive from Ollie's mid-line ……ふぅ sigh — the two onee-sans are correctly separated by WHERE the exhale falls. Registers map to JA literary registers correctly: Ico's Sei Shōnagon ものは尽くし run-on and chuuni 我/なのだ are already JA-native (no transcreation tax); Coaster's Issa 体言止め/5-7-5; Dodi's Austen-as-回文. Speech-patterns are recreated via JA-native devices not byte-tricks: high-symmetry→回文/chiastic, self-dual→puff-then-puncture across a dash, Mo's one-sided→TAGGED 【反転】 seam at a clause boundary over FORWARD text (correctly never byte-reversed, with a kinsoku/ruby legibility note). Gaps to fill (cast not shown in JSON but locked): the TPMS trio Gyro/Percy/Dee needs three audibly-distinct JA registers (Gyro recursive-mantra ～のなかに～がある nesting; Percy Orwell-windowpane plain-だ; Dee King-James/Merton plainsong — likely 文語/古雅 体言止め or なり/たり archaic-liturgical), and Sette's self-choir + Hopkins sprung-rhythm is the toughest unwritten JA brief. Verify Lex's helicoid 'stepwise rising clauses' gets a JA device (e.g. ascending ～て、～て ladder) distinct from Cooper's hyperbolic sprawl.
verify.zhCheck: Authentically ZH, not translated-EN — the direction correctly pivots off DICTION/REGISTER/成语 rather than trying to port JA pronoun/particle machinery. The chengyu casting is genuinely native and often math-true, which is the highest compliment: Dodi 表里如一/见微者见全 (every-angle-same), Spike's keystone pun 八面玲珑 for the 8-cornered octahedron (a real gift, near-perfect in both scripts), Boxy's deadpan 四平八稳/不偏不倚 (literally 'four-square'), Cooper's 曲中有直/外曲内直 (curved-without-straight-within for a ruled hyperboloid — excellent), Coaster 恬淡寡欲/心如止水, Cans 了如指掌/一丝不苟, Mo's 将错就错 ('turn the mistake into the plan on purpose' = textbook 'I MEANT to do that'), Twiggy 谨小慎微/三思而后行. Registers are correctly differentiated and authentic: 老舍-vernacular-warmth for homebodies (Pip/Ollie/Scoop), 鲁迅-spare-deadpan for Boxy/Cat, 文言-pastiche for Tetra's chuuni bombast (and the note that zh-Hant heightens the mock-classical grandeur is a sharp observation), 沈从文 lyrical-drift for Cooper, 文雅/端庄 for Dodi. The Boxy/Spike chengyu-asymmetry (Boxy REFUSES idiom→bare nouns; Spike OVER-reaches→flourishes) is the right way to build a manzai mirror in a language with weak particle characterization — diction does the work. simpTradNote is handled responsibly: mostly pure-glyph for plain characters (Pip near-identical Hans/Hant = correctly framed as a feature), with real lexical/register tuning flagged where it matters (Tetra more archaic in Hant; 儿化 尖儿/点儿 dropped to neutral 尖端/一点 in Hant for Scoop/Ollie). Tone-interaction flags are present and correct: Boxy=compress tone contours toward monotone, Spike=wide operatic contours (the dual-mirror lives in tonal-EXCURSION WIDTH — a smart ZH-native realization of one-voice-mirrored), and Mo's flip is correctly flagged as the documented ZH exception (NO pitch-mirror DSP — mirror PHRASING not pitch contour, clean re-take, to preserve lexical tone).
